SECTION 2: MODEL DETAILS

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: PLD
  Organization: NVIDIA GEAR Lab
  Date: 2025-10-30
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.00091
  Code: None
  Venue: ReALM-GEN Workshop @ ICLR 2026
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: plug-and-play residual RL framework (probe → learn → distill back to generalist)
    Backbone: varies (wraps existing VLAs)
    LLM: varies (wraps existing VLAs)
    Parameters: varies (applied on top of existing VLAs)
  Tags: residual-RL, probe-learn-distill, post-training, ICLR-2026-workshop
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=99.0): libero_avg=99.0
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'RL post-trained', 'simpler_env': 'RL post-trained'}
  AI Review Summary: Probe-Learn-Distill (PLD) 3단계 프레임워크로, residual RL로 VLA의 실패 영역을 탐색(probe)하고, hybrid rollout으로 데이터를 수집(learn)하며, 이를 다시 supervised FT로 정제(distill)하여 LIBERO 99% 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: SimpleVLA-RL
  Organization: Shanghai Jiao Tong University / Peking University / Shanghai AI Lab / HKU
  Date: 2025-09-11
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.09674
  Code: https://github.com/PRIME-RL/SimpleVLA-RL
  Venue: ICLR 2026
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive + GRPO reinforcement learning
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Inference: 10 Hz
  Tags: 7B, RL, GRPO, reinforcement-learning, ICLR-2026, open-source, SOTA, data-efficient
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=98.83): libero_spatial=99.1, libero_object=99.2, libero_goal=98.5, libero_long=98.5
    robotwin_v1 (avg=70.4): hammer_beat=92.6, block_handover=89.6, blocks_stack=40.2, shoe_place=59.3, average=70.4
    robotwin_v2 (avg=68.8): short_horizon=64.9, medium_horizon=72.5, long_horizon=69.0, average=68.8
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'RL fine-tuned (on top of SFT)', 'robotwin_v1': 'RL fine-tuned', 'robotwin_v2': 'RL fine-tuned'}
  Peer Review:
    Venue: ICLR 2026, Decision: poster
    Review Avg: 7.5, Confidence: 4.25

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: VLA-IAP
  Organization: HKUST / CUHK / South China Normal University / NUDT / USTB
  Date: 2026-03-24
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22991
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: training-free visual token pruning (applied to OpenVLA-OFT, pi0, pi0.5, DreamVLA)
    Backbone: None
    LLM: None
    Parameters: N/A (framework, not a model)
  Tags: token-pruning, training-free, efficiency, speedup, multi-VLA, libero
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.8): libero_spatial=97.6, libero_object=99.6, libero_goal=98.4, libero_long=95.6
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned (OpenVLA-OFT base)'}
  AI Review Summary: Geometric prior (Sobel edge) + semantic prior (cross-modal attention) + motion prior (temporal difference)를 결합한 training-free token pruning으로, OpenVLA-OFT에서 LIBERO **97.8%** (baseline 97.1%) at **1.25× speedup**, 최대 **1.54× at 30% retention**.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: X-VLA
  Organization: Tsinghua University AIR / Shanghai AI Lab
  Date: 2025-10-11
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.10274
  Code: https://github.com/2toinf/X-VLA
  Venue: ICLR 2026
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: flow matching with embodiment-specific soft prompts (chunk_size=32)
    Backbone: Florence-Large
    LLM: None
    Parameters: 0.9B
  Inference: 25 Hz
  Tags: 0.9B, soft-prompt, cross-embodiment, ICLR-2026, open-source, AgiBot-champion, efficient
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.8): libero_spatial=98.4, libero_object=98.8, libero_goal=97.6, libero_long=96.4
    calvin (avg=4.4): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=4.4
    simpler_env: simpler_widowx_vm=80.4, simpler_widowx_va=75.7
    robotwin_v2 (avg=72.5): robotwin_v2_avg=72.5

    Venue: ICLR 2026, Decision: poster

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: Fast-WAM
  Organization: Tsinghua University (IIIS) / Galaxea AI
  Date: 2026-03-17
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16666
  Code: https://github.com/yuantianyuan01/FastWAM
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: flow matching (velocity field)
    Backbone: Wan2.2 Video DiT (5B)
    LLM: None
    Parameters: 6B
  Inference: 5 Hz
  Tags: 6B, world-action-model, flow-matching, video-DiT, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.6): libero_avg=97.6
    robotwin_v1 (avg=91.8): average=91.8
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'robotwin_v1': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: Wan2.2-5B video DiT + 1B action expert (6B total)의 WAM에서, test-time video generation을 제거해도 성능이 **"highly comparable"** (RoboTwin 91.8%, LIBERO 97.6%)하면서 latency **190ms (vs IDM 810ms, 4.3x 가속)** 달성. 핵심: video co-training 제거 시 **-8%p** 하락.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: VLA-Thinker
  Organization: University of Central Florida / University of Wurzburg / USC / NVIDIA Research
  Date: 2026-03-15
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14523
  Code: https://github.com/CYWang735/VLAThinker
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: reasoning, libero, robotwin, robotwin_v2, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.45): libero_spatial=98.7, libero_object=99.0, libero_goal=95.2, libero_long=96.9
    robotwin_v2 (avg=65.88): lift_pot=64.8, beat_hammer_block=82.5, pick_dual_bottles=65.4, place_phone_stand=36.6, move_can_pot=61.0, place_a2b_left=39.1, place_empty_cup=92.7, handover_mic=89.9, handover_block=52.8, stack_bowls_two=71.1, blocks_rank_rgb=79.3, put_bottles_dustbin=55.4, short_horizon_avg=62.3, medium_horizon_avg=70.7, long_horizon_avg=64.6
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'SFT + RL fine-tuned (GRPO)', 'robotwin_v2': 'SFT + RL fine-tuned (GRPO)'}
  AI Review Summary: Perception을 "동적으로 호출 가능한 reasoning action"으로 모델링하여 multimodal embodied CoT를 구현하고, 2-stage training (SFT + RL alignment)으로 LIBERO 97.5% 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: DreamVLA
  Organization: Shanghai AI Lab / Fudan University / NUS
  Date: 2025-07-06
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04447
  Code: https://github.com/DreamLM/Dream-VLX
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: inverse dynamics from world knowledge forecasts (depth, DINOv2, SAM)
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, world-knowledge-forecasting, inverse-dynamics, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.2): libero_avg=97.2
    calvin (avg=4.44): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=4.44
    simpler_env: simpler_bridge=71.4, simpler_fractal=60.5
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned', 'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: Dynamic region reconstruction + depth prediction + semantic feature의 3종 world knowledge를 block-wise structured attention으로 분리 학습하고 DiT action decoder와 결합하여, CALVIN ABC-D **4.44 avg len** (SOTA) + LIBERO **92.6%** + real-world **76.7%** 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: DeepThinkVLA
  Organization: Huazhong University of Science and Technology / Tsinghua University / Renmin University of China
  Date: 2025-11-24
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.15669
  Code: https://github.com/wadeKeith/DeepThinkVLA
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: hybrid-attention decoder (causal CoT → bidirectional parallel action)
    Backbone: pi0-FAST (PaliGemma 2)
    LLM: Gemma-2 2B
    Parameters: 2.9B
  Tags: reasoning, chain-of-thought, RL, GRPO, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.05): libero_spatial=96.6, libero_object=99.0, libero_goal=96.4, libero_long=96.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'SFT + RL fine-tuned (GRPO)'}

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: AtomicVLA
  Organization: Sun Yat-sen University / Peng Cheng Laboratory / Yinwang Intelligent Technology
  Date: 2026-03-08
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07648
  Code: https://github.com/zhanglk9/AtomicVLA
  Venue: CVPR2026
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Skill-Guided MoE (SG-MoE)
    Backbone: PaliGemma (SigLIP + Gemma 2B, via pi0)
    LLM: Gemma 2B
    Parameters: 4.17B
  Tags: libero, calvin, CVPR2026, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=96.6): libero_long=95.2, libero_avg=96.6
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: π₀ foundation model 위에 Skill-Guided MoE (SG-MoE)를 구축하여, atomic skill 단위의 expert routing으로 long-horizon 태스크에서 π₀.₅ 대비 +18.3% real-world 향상, continual learning에서 catastrophic forgetting을 -1.3%로 최소화 (π₀.₅는 -15%).
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: MemoryVLA
  Organization: PKU / Tsinghua University / Shanghai AI Lab

  Architecture:

    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, memory, temporal-context, long-horizon, ICLR-2026, open-source, diffusion-transformer

  Venue: ICLR 2026 submission (rejected)

    LLM: LLaDA-8B-Instruct (discrete diffusion LM)

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: GST-VLA
  Organization: Yeungnam University / KAIST
  Date: 2026-03-10
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.09079
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: flow matching
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2, via OpenVLA)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 300M action expert
  Tags: libero, simpler_env
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=96.33): libero_spatial=98.2, libero_object=97.4, libero_goal=97.1, libero_long=92.6
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 2D patch token 대신 3D anisotropic Gaussian primitives로 시각 정보를 인코딩하고, 3D Depth-Aware Chain-of-Thought를 결합하여 LIBERO 96.4% (+2.0%), SimplerEnv 80.2% (+5.4%) 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: DD-VLA
  Organization: PKU / Shanghai AI Lab
  Date: 2025-08-27
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.20072
  Code: https://github.com/Liang-ZX/DiscreteDiffusionVLA
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: discrete diffusion over tokenized action chunks with adaptive decoding order
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, discrete-diffusion, adaptive-decoding, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=96.3): libero_avg=96.3
    simpler_env: simpler_fractal=71.2, simpler_bridge=54.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenVLA의 Prismatic-7B backbone 내에서 **bidirectional discrete diffusion**을 구현하여, autoregressive 대비 2x 빠른 추론(68.8ms vs 136.2ms)과 LIBERO 96.3%, SimplerEnv-Fractal 64.1%를 달성하며, 적응적 디코딩 순서와 secondary re-masking으로 오류 교정 지원.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Code: None
  Venue: None

    Action Head: structured world model planner with unified discrete token vocabulary (2-stage)
    Backbone: None
    LLM: None
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: world-model, structured-planner, libero, simpler_env, discrete-token

    libero (avg=94.8): libero_avg=94.8
    simpler_env: simpler_widowx=75.0
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 기존 WAM의 dense future frame 예측 대신, gripper transition과 kinematic turning point 등 **sparse structured frame**만 예측하여 plan drift를 방지하고, SimplerEnv-WidowX **75.0%** + LIBERO **94.8%** 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: pi*0.6
  Organization: Physical Intelligence
  Date: 2025-11-18
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.14759
  Code: https://github.com/Physical-Intelligence/openpi
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: flow matching + RL (RECAP)
    Backbone: Gemma 3 4B VLM
    LLM: Gemma 3 4B
    Parameters: ~5B (4B VLM + ~860M action expert)
  Tags: 5B, flow-matching, RL, RECAP, real-world, manipulation, open-source, cross-embodiment
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=93.1): libero_spatial=96.4, libero_object=97.2, libero_goal=95.6, libero_long=83.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: RECAP (RL with Experience and Corrections via Advantage-conditioned Policies)을 통해 VLA가 실제 배포 경험에서 자기개선하여, 태스크 throughput 2배 이상 증가 및 실패율 절반 감소 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

MODEL: ECoT

  Date: 2024-07-11

  Open Source: True

    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)

    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, chain-of-thought, embodied-reasoning, autoregressive, open-source

  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned with CoT reasoning'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenVLA-7B에 6단계 embodied CoT (task rephrase→plan→subtask→move→gripper→objects)를 추가하여, Bridge V2에서 **Octo 대비 +45%p, OpenVLA 대비 +22%p** (ID 66%), Gemini 1.0으로 reasoning chain 자동 생성, 비동기 실행으로 +40% 추론 가속.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Date: 2025-05-21

  Tags: 3B, diffusion-transformer, world-model, future-alignment, manipulation
  Benchmarks:

  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: DiT에 M=32 learnable future token을 추가하고, SigLIP-2 기반 action-aware embedding의 cosine alignment loss로 latent world modeling을 수행하여, RoboCasa 24-task에서 **70.1%** (baseline 61.9%, +8.2%p), GR1 24-task에서 **55.0%** (+11%p), 추론 overhead **zero**.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Venue: CoRL 2025
  Open Source: False

    LLM: Qwen2 ~1.5B (via Qwen2-VL-2B)

  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: Qwen2-VL 2B에 **1B 파라미터 diffusion expert** (32-layer transformer)를 plug-in하고, 3-stage curriculum (cross-embodiment→embodiment-specific→task-specific)으로 학습하여, 셔츠 접기 0.92, LIBERO 97.3%, **60Hz inference on A6000** 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: OpenVLA-OFT
  Organization: Stanford / UC Berkeley / TRI
  Date: 2025-02-27
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.19645
  Code: https://github.com/moojink/openvla-oft
  Venue: RSS 2025
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: parallel decoding + continuous actions
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, parallel-decoding, LoRA, manipulation, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=87.35): libero_spatial=94.8, libero_object=95.2, libero_goal=91.0, libero_long=68.4
    simpler_env: google_robot_pick_coke_can=82.0, google_robot_move_near=68.5
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned (LoRA)', 'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned (LoRA)'}
  AI Review Summary: VLA fine-tuning의 3대 설계 선택 (parallel decoding + L1 regression + action chunking)을 체계적으로 분석하여, OpenVLA에서 LIBERO **76.5%→97.1%** (+20.6%p), **26x throughput** (LIBERO 8-step chunk), **43x** (ALOHA 25-step), real bimanual에서 기존 대비 **+15%p** 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: CoT-VLA
  Organization: UC Berkeley
  Date: 2025-03-27
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.22020
  Code: None
  Venue: CVPR 2025
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive (256-bin discretized, 7 tokens × 10-step chunks via VILA-U)
    Backbone: SigLIP (via VILA-U)
    LLM: LLaMA-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, chain-of-thought, diffusion, reasoning, manipulation
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=86.32): libero_spatial=92.1, libero_object=93.8, libero_goal=88.2, libero_long=71.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: VILA-U 기반 7B VLA에 시각적 CoT(미래 subgoal image 예측)를 autoregressive하게 통합하고, hybrid attention + action chunking으로 LIBERO 81.1%, real-world 17% 향상 달성. 단, 이미지 생성으로 **7배 추론 slowdown**.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Date: 2025-01-23
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.09747

  Venue: None

    Backbone: PaliGemma-based VLM
    LLM: Gemma-based
    Parameters: 3B
  Inference: 230 Hz
  Tags: 3B, autoregressive, FAST-tokenizer, manipulation, hybrid
  Benchmarks:

  AI Review Summary: Discrete cosine transform 기반 주파수 공간 action tokenization (FAST)을 제안하여, 기존 binning 대비 고주파 dexterous 태스크에서의 정확도를 크게 향상시키고 학습 시간을 최대 5배 단축.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: RoboVLM
  Organization: Tsinghua University / ByteDance Research / CASIA / SJTU / NUS
  Date: 2024-12-18
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.14058
  Code: https://github.com/Robot-VLM/RoboVLM
  Venue: ICLR 2025
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: latent action tokenization (VQ-VAE) + autoregressive
    Backbone: KosMos VLM (best config; framework supports 8 VLM backbones)
    LLM: KosMos 2B (best config)
    Parameters: 2B
  Tags: 2B, VQ-VAE, autoregressive, manipulation, open-source, cross-embodiment
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=84.05): libero_spatial=91.8, libero_object=93.4, libero_goal=86.8, libero_long=64.2
    calvin (avg=3.5): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=3.5
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 8개 VLM backbone, 4개 policy architecture, 600+ 실험을 통해 VLA 설계의 핵심 요인을 체계적으로 분석하고, 이를 바탕으로 구축한 RoboVLMs가 manipulation 벤치마크에서 SOTA 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: RDT-1B
  Organization: Tsinghua University / Shanghai Qi Zhi Institute
  Date: 2024-10-10
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.07864
  Code: https://github.com/thu-ml/RoboticsDiffusionTransformer
  Venue: ICLR 2025
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: diffusion (scalable transformer)
    Backbone: SigLIP-So400m + T5-v1_1-XXL (language encoder)
    LLM: None
    Parameters: 1.2B
  Tags: 1.2B, diffusion, manipulation, open-source, foundation-model, bimanual
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=82.5): libero_spatial=90.2, libero_object=91.8, libero_goal=85.6, libero_long=62.4
    calvin (avg=3.4): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=3.4
    robotwin_v1 (avg=28.5): robotwin_easy=42.6, robotwin_hard=14.4
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned', 'robotwin_v1': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 1.2B 파라미터 diffusion transformer로 Physically Interpretable Unified Action Space를 정의하여 cross-robot bimanual manipulation을 수행하고, zero-shot 일반화와 few-shot 적응을 실현.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: SmoothVLA
  Organization: Chongqing University of Posts and Telecommunications / Chinese Academy of Sciences / USTC
  Date: 2026-03-14
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13925
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive with action chunking + GRPO RL fine-tuning for smoothness
    Backbone: Prismatic-7B (OpenVLA base)
    LLM: Llama 2 7B
    Parameters: ~7B
  Tags: smoothness, GRPO, RL, OpenVLA-based, jerk-penalty, physics-informed, libero
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=80.5): libero_avg=80.5, libero_spatial_robustness_avg=54.1
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'rl'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenVLA에 physics-informed hybrid reward (binary task reward + jerk-based smoothness penalty, λ=0.2)를 적용한 GRPO RL로, 기존 RL 대비 **13.8% smoothness 향상** + LIBERO-Plus robustness **46.2%** (SFT 22.0% 대비 +24.2%p) 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: OpenVLA
  Organization: Stanford / UC Berkeley / TRI / Google DeepMind / PI / MIT
  Date: 2024-06-13
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.09246
  Code: https://github.com/openvla/openvla
  Venue: CoRL 2024
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive (tokenized)
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, autoregressive, manipulation, open-source, generalist
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=74.5): libero_spatial=84.2, libero_object=88.4, libero_goal=72.0, libero_long=53.4
    simpler_env: google_robot_pick_coke_can=56.2, google_robot_move_near=28.4
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: SigLIP+DINOv2 dual encoder (600M) + Llama 2 (7B)를 970K OXE demonstration에서 학습한 오픈소스 VLA로, BridgeV2 **76.2%**, Google Robot **79.4%**로 RT-2-X (55B)를 능가하며 LoRA로 **RTX 3090에서 fine-tuning** 가능. **64×A100, 14일 (21,500 A100-hrs)** 학습.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

    Backbone: Transformer (custom encoder-decoder)
    LLM: None
    Parameters: 93M
  Tags: 93M, diffusion, manipulation, open-source, generalist, modular

  AI Review Summary: 93M transformer를 OXE 800K trajectory (25 datasets)에서 학습한 오픈소스 generalist policy로, 9개 로봇 플랫폼에서 검증. Fine-tuning 시 baseline 대비 **+52%p**, 100 target demos + 5시간 A5000으로 새 로봇·센서·action space에 적응.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: Diffusion Policy
  Organization: Columbia University / MIT / TRI
  Date: 2023-03-07
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.04137
  Code: https://github.com/real-stanford/diffusion_policy
  Venue: RSS 2023
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: diffusion (DDPM)
    Backbone: ResNet-18 / Transformer
    LLM: None
    Parameters: ~25M
  Tags: 25M, diffusion, manipulation, open-source, foundational, task-specific
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=66.75): libero_spatial=78.4, libero_object=80.6, libero_goal=68.2, libero_long=39.8
    robotwin_v1 (avg=10.8): robotwin_easy=18.4, robotwin_hard=3.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'robotwin_v1': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 로봇 visuomotor policy를 조건부 denoising diffusion process로 정의하여, CNN(1D temporal) 및 Transformer(minGPT) 두 구현을 제공하고, 12개 태스크에서 position control로 기존 대비 평균 46.9% 성능 향상, real-world에서 Push-T 95%, 6DoF mug flip 90% 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: 3D-VLA
  Organization: UMass Amherst / MIT / MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab
  Date: 2024-03-14
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.09631
  Code: https://github.com/UMass-Embodied-AGI/3D-VLA
  Venue: ICML 2024
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: embodied diffusion model aligned to 3D-LLM for goal generation + action prediction
    Backbone: BLIP2 (Q-Former + 3D multi-view features)
    LLM: FlanT5
    Parameters: 3B–11B (FlanT5 backbone)
  Tags: 3D, world-model, point-cloud, diffusion, open-source
  AI Review Summary: BLIP2-FlanT5XL 기반 3D-LLM에 interaction token(물체·위치·행동)과 embodied diffusion model(RGB-D/point cloud 목표 생성)을 결합하여, 2M 3D-language-action 데이터 쌍으로 학습한 최초의 3D 기반 embodied generative world model.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: 3D Diffuser Actor
  Organization: ETH Zurich / NVIDIA
  Date: 2024-02-16
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.10885
  Code: https://github.com/nickgkan/3d_diffuser_actor
  Venue: CoRL 2024
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: diffusion (3D denoising)
    Backbone: 3D scene encoder (point cloud + features)
    LLM: CLIP (language conditioning)
    Parameters: ~50M
  Tags: 50M, diffusion, 3D, manipulation, open-source, rlbench, calvin
  Benchmarks:
    calvin (avg=3.2): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=3.2, calvin_abc_d_1=92.4, calvin_abc_d_2=78.1, calvin_abc_d_3=62.4, calvin_abc_d_4=46.8, calvin_abc_d_5=33.6
    rlbench (avg=68.2): rlbench_18tasks=68.2
  Eval Conditions: {'calvin': 'fine-tuned', 'rlbench': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: CLIP ResNet50로 추출한 2D feature를 depth로 3D로 lifting하고, 3D relative position attention을 가진 denoising transformer로 keypose를 생성하여, RLBench multi-view에서 81.3% (+18.1%p SOTA), single-view 78.4% (+13.1%p), CALVIN 3.27 avg len 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: AVDC
  Organization: CMU
  Date: 2023-10-25
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.08576
  Code: https://github.com/flow-diffusion/AVDC
  Venue: ICLR 2024

    Backbone: Video Diffusion (flow generation)
    LLM: None
    Parameters: None
  Tags: video-diffusion, flow-prediction, inverse-dynamics, manipulation, open-source

  Eval Conditions: {'rlbench': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: Action annotation 없는 비디오에서 text-conditioned video diffusion model로 미래 프레임을 생성하고, optical flow 기반 dense correspondence + rigid body transformation으로 3D action을 역추론하여, 165개 비디오만으로 Meta-World 43.1% (BC 16.2% 대비 2.7배) 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Date: 2024-08-21

  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Venue: None

    Backbone: None

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: DeeR-VLA
  Organization: Tsinghua University / Shanghai AI Lab
  Date: 2024-11-04
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.02359
  Code: https://github.com/yueyang130/DeeR-VLA
  Venue: NeurIPS 2024
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: multi-exit early-stopping with action consistency metric
    Backbone: OpenFlamingo
    LLM: MPT-1B
    Parameters: 3B
  Tags: 3B, dynamic-inference, early-exit, efficient, open-source
  Eval Conditions: {'calvin': 'fine-tuned (dynamic inference)'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenFlamingo (3B/9B) 기반 MLLM에 multi-exit 구조를 추가하여, action consistency 기반 early-exit으로 LLM GFLOPs를 **2.5-5.2x 절감** (Table 2: 31.2→10.0~12.5 GFLOPs, Table 5 best: 31.2→6.0), 실제 latency **68.1% 감소** (55→17.5ms)하면서 CALVIN 성능 유지(4.08 vs 4.07).
  AI Review: PDF-verified

    Parameters: 950M
  Tags: 950M, flow-matching, efficient, manipulation, open-source
  AI Review Summary: VLM의 30-50% layer를 pruning하여 intermediate fusion하고, 18-layer flow transformer(339M) + Global-AdaLN으로 action 생성하는 **947M VLA**로, CALVIN ABC **4.53 SOTA**, 10개 벤치마크에서 평균 25.1% 향상, **200 H100 GPU-hours** (48h on 4 H100s)로 학습.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: Gemini Robotics
  Organization: Google DeepMind
  Date: 2025-03-12
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.20020
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Gemini 2.0 foundation model: VLA (end-to-end) + ER (embodied reasoning) + On-Device variants
    Backbone: Gemini 2.0 VLM
    LLM: Gemini 2.0
    Parameters: not disclosed (Gemini 2.0 scale)
  Tags: Gemini-2.0, cross-embodiment, end-to-end, embodied-reasoning, proprietary
  AI Review Summary: Google DeepMind의 Gemini 2.0 기반 대규모 VLA 모델 패밀리로, 범용 조작·open-vocabulary 지시 이해·few-shot 적응·cross-embodiment 일반화를 단일 모델에서 달성하며, embodied reasoning 특화 모델(Gemini Robotics-ER)을 함께 제안.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

  Venue: None

    Backbone: Wan 2.2 Diffusion Transformer (5B)
    LLM: None
    Parameters: 5B
  Inference: 2.8 Hz
  Tags: world-action-model, flow-matching, video-DiT, efficient-inference

  Eval Conditions: {'robotwin_v2': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 기존 video-centered WAM의 추론 병목을 해결하기 위해 action 예측을 중심으로 비디오 생성을 조건부로 재구성하는 action-centered WAM을 제안하여, 기존 대비 9배 빠른 추론과 7% 높은 성공률 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

MODEL: GR-1
  Organization: ByteDance
  Date: 2023-12-20
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.13139
  Code: https://github.com/bytedance/GR-1
  Venue: ICLR 2024
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive (next-token prediction)
    Backbone: GPT-style Transformer
    LLM: Custom GPT (130M)
    Parameters: 130M
  Inference: 4 Hz
  Tags: 130M, autoregressive, video-prediction, manipulation, language-conditioned, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    calvin (avg=3.1): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=3.1, calvin_abc_d_1=88.7, calvin_abc_d_2=72.4, calvin_abc_d_3=55.8, calvin_abc_d_4=40.2, calvin_abc_d_5=28.1
  Eval Conditions: {'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 195M GPT-style transformer (46M trainable)를 Ego4D 800K 비디오 클립으로 video generation 사전학습한 후, CALVIN에서 **ABCD→D avg len 4.21** (HULC 3.06 대비 +37.6%), unseen scene zero-shot **85.4%** (기존 53.3% 대비 +60%) 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: KineVLA
  Organization: Gaoge Han et al.
  Date: 2026-03-22
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.17524
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive with bi-level VQ action tokens (RVQ-VAE: goal codebook + kinematics codebook)
    Backbone: Prismatic-7B (OpenVLA base)
    LLM: Llama 2 7B
    Parameters: ~7B
  Inference: 10.4 Hz
  Tags: kinematics-aware, bi-level-VQ, RVQ-VAE, OpenVLA-based, LoRA, libero
  Benchmarks:
    libero: libero_goal_relabeled_kinematics=76.5, libero_kine_kinematics=70.4
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenVLA 위에 bi-level RVQ-VAE (goal codebook + kinematics codebook)를 구축하여, goal-invariant 행동과 kinematics-variant 행동을 분리하고, kinematics-sensitive task에서 **76.5%** kinematics SR (baseline 35%) + 96ms inference 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

    Backbone: None

    Backbone: LLaVA-OneVision-0.5B

  AI Review Summary: VLA의 실용성(practicality)을 체계적으로 재평가하기 위한 CEBench 벤치마크를 제안하고, consumer-grade GPU에서 구동 가능한 경량 LLaVA-VLA 모델을 설계.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False

    Parameters: 3B
  Tags: 3B, FAST+, compact, 970k-demos, open-source
  AI Review Summary: Qwen-2.5-VL-3B + FAST+ tokenizer(+2048 tokens)로, 970K OXE demonstration에서 **4000 H100 GPU-hours** 학습하여, WidowX real-world **56.7%** (OpenVLA 40%), LIBERO-Long **74.6%** (NORA-Long), inference **8.3GB** GPU memory.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: RoboDual
  Organization: Shanghai AI Lab (OpenDriveLab)
  Date: 2024-10-10
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.08001
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: dual-system: OpenVLA 7B generalist + 20M Diffusion Transformer specialist via cross-attention
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B + 20M
  Tags: 7B+20M, dual-system, diffusion-transformer, cross-attention
  AI Review Summary: VLA-based generalist (System 2)와 diffusion-transformer specialist (System 1)를 20M 학습 가능 파라미터로 결합하여, real-world 26.7% 향상과 CALVIN 12% 향상을 3.8x 높은 제어 주파수에서 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

  Date: 2024-06-06

  Code: None
  Venue: NeurIPS 2024
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: lightweight MLP policy head (3.7M) for SE(3) pose
    Backbone: CLIP ViT-L/14
    LLM: Mamba 2.7B (SSM, not transformer LLM)
    Parameters: 3.2B (2.7B Mamba + CLIP)
  Tags: 3.2B, Mamba-SSM, MLP-action-head, efficient
  AI Review Summary: Mamba state space model을 VLA backbone으로 활용하여, Transformer 대비 3배 빠른 추론과 우수한 robotic reasoning을 최소한의 파라미터 fine-tuning으로 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

  Code: None

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: Vlaser
  Organization: USTC / Shanghai AI Lab / SJTU / Zhejiang University / NJU / Fudan / Tsinghua / NUS
  Date: 2025-10-13
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.11027
  Code: https://github.com/OpenGVLab/Vlaser
  Venue: ICLR 2026
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: flow matching action expert
    Backbone: InternVL3
    LLM: Qwen2.5-1.5B (2B variant) / Qwen2.5-7B (8B variant)
    Parameters: 2B / 8B
  Tags: 2B, 8B, reasoning, embodied-reasoning, InternVL, ICLR-2026, open-source, Vlaser-6M
  Benchmarks:
    simpler_env: simpler_bridge_widowx=78.6, simpler_google_robot=68.4
  Eval Conditions: {'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned'}

    Venue: ICLR 2026, Decision: poster
    Review Avg: 5.0, Confidence: 3.25

    LLM: None
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: simpler_env, robocasa
  Eval Conditions: {'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned', 'robocasa': 'fine-tuned'}

================================================================================
SECTION 3: BENCHMARK DEFINITIONS
================================================================================

LIBERO: 4 manipulation suites (Spatial, Object, Goal, Long-horizon)
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.
  Primary ranking metric for VLA-Tracker.

CALVIN: Long-horizon language-conditioned manipulation (ABC→D setting)
  Score: Average number of tasks completed in sequence (0-5). Higher is better.

SimplerEnv: Sim-to-real transfer evaluation
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

RoboTwin v1/v2: Bimanual dual-arm manipulation (50+ tasks)
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

RLBench: Diverse manipulation tasks (18 tasks)
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

RoboCasa: Home robot manipulation tasks
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

================================================================================
END OF FILE
Total: 126 models, 39 with LIBERO scores
